Easter Sunrise Service at St. Nicholas, Tolleshunt Major

Holy Week and Easter across our Diocese

The children at St. Francis Church, West Horndon, brought a biblical passage to life through art

St Clement’s, Leigh-on-Sea, held a Palm Sunday service full of families, children, and joy

St James’, Harlow, had a wonderful Mother’s Day service
